tools.name: token_get_holder_analysis
tools.description:
Use this when you need to analyze token holder distribution and concentration risk. Returns holder metrics in JSON.

1. topHolders: array of top 10 holders with address, balance, percentage of supply
2. top10Concentration: percentage of total supply held by top 10 wallets
3. whaleCount: number of wa

tools.name: token_get_holder_analysis
tools.description:
Use this when you need to analyze token holder distribution and concentration risk. Returns holder metrics in JSON. POST variant of token_get_holder_analysis -- same params passed as JSON body instead of query string.

1. topHolders: array of top 10 holders with address, balance, percentage of suppl

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: token_get_holder_analysis · Private data: token_get_holder_analysis, token_get_holder_analysis · Public sink: token_get_holder_analysis.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: token_get_holder_analysis · Private data: token_get_holder_analysis, token_get_holder_analysis · Public sink: token_get_holder_analysis

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.

findings.title: Tool description changed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "token_get_holder_analysis" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet:
before: "Use this when you need to analyze token holder distribution and concentration risk. Returns holder metrics in JSON.

1. topHolders: array of top 10 holders with address, balance, percentage of supply
2. top10Concentration: percentage of total supply held by top 10 wallets
3. whaleCount: number of wa" → after: "Use this when you need to analyze token holder distribution and concentration risk. Returns holder metrics in JSON. POST variant of token_get_holder_analysis -- same params passed as JSON body instead of query string.

1. topHolders: array of top 10 holders with address, balance, percentage of suppl"

findings.remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.
